assessment.note: He sounds engaged with the codebase but volunteered a clarity gap about how decisions are made here, which is off-signature and should be picked up next.

new_queue.label: Decision-making map
new_queue.name: When you say 'how decisions are really made here,' what feels least clear?
new_queue.description: Drills into his specific uncertainty about decision-making norms before moving on.

new_queue.label: Team map
new_queue.name: Who have you had the most useful direct conversations with so far?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether he is building real team context beyond docs and async notes.

new_queue.label: Context sources
new_queue.name: When you need context before making a code decision, where do you go first?
new_queue.description: Shows whether he knows the right people and channels for architecture context.

new_queue.label: Assumption traps
new_queue.name: What kind of situation makes you feel like you might be assuming the wrong thing?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the signals he uses to notice when his mental model may diverge from the team's reality.

new_queue.label: Support network
new_queue.name: Who should be part of your go-to support circle here?
new_queue.description: Identifies the relationships that should be intentionally built next to keep onboarding moving.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks easier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning any missing context into a concrete support request for the next stretch.
